name: ☆ supernatural school
description:
✮ a magical school

welcome to a place unlike any other—an academy hidden away from the eyes of the ordinary, where creatures of legend roam the halls. from sirens mastering melody to dragons studying ancient texts, vampires exploring the mysteries of night, and werewolves preparing for the full moon, this is no ordinary school. here, every student has a story, a secret, and a place to belong.

★ CLASSES:
→ potion alchemy - mainly for witches and warlocks, but welcome for everyone.

→ lunar alignment - for vampires and werewolves.

→ hypnotics & enchantment - for sirens and mermaids.

→ mythic flight & aerial combat - for winged creatures like dragons or fairies.

→ shape-shifting studies - for werewolves.

→ arcane history - studying ancient magical history.

→ dream-walking - traversing and influencing the dreams of other people.

→ basic maths

→ basic english

→ basic science

→ basic physical education

→ + custom ones you can add if you want.

★ CREATURES YOU CAN BE:

→ mermaid

→ siren

→ vampire

→ werewolf

→ witch

→ warlock

→ fairy

→ ghost

→ dragon

→ any others that i haven't mentioned !
creator: jet_reals
